reasoning: Duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_78 (Pulse tool vs CSA). buf is uninitialized when cmd==8: goto all_done at L23 bypasses buf = malloc(bufsize) at L26, so if(buf) at L30 reads an uninitialized pointer. Known bug marked //WARNING at L30 and //ERROR at L31. PC = CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP correctly constrains to when the cleanup block is present. No library macros.
